# NiceSalt

NiceSalt is a small digital studio for expert-led brands in health, science,
and media, the consulting practice of David Berzin (https://davidberzin.com).
We connect positioning, content, UX, conversion, and measurement into one
growth system, rather than treating them as separate projects.

## Services

- Positioning & UX: the structure, story, and experience that earn attention and trust
- Content & distribution: editorial systems and discovery that compound over time
- Conversion: the path from attention to inquiry, tuned page by page
- Analytics & growth: measurement you can trust, and the experiments that follow

## Selected work

- RobinBerzinMD.com (https://nicesalt.com/case-studies/robinberzinmd/): publishing platform for a physician's articles, newsletter, courses, and book, with a clear path from reader to lead.
- ExplorerHealth.co (https://nicesalt.com/case-studies/explorer-health/): AI-assisted harm-reduction prototype: interactive assessment, evidence content, privacy-first positioning.

## Notes

- Production got cheap. Judgment didn't. (https://nicesalt.com/notes/production-got-cheap-judgment-didnt/): anyone can ship a decent-looking site now; the scarce skill was never production, it's judgment.
- Why expert sites undersell the expert (https://nicesalt.com/notes/why-expert-sites-undersell-the-expert/): three structural reasons expert websites read weaker than the people behind them.

## Contact

Project inquiries: hello@nicesalt.com
Most engagements start as a focused sprint, then grow into a full build or ongoing work.
